case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CONOR PULLMAN ET AL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Roger E. Jackson, Esq., specially appearing for Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of counsel for Plaintiff. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to March 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
